summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the TMS One tool creation functionality. Successfully tested the 'Nova Ferramenta' modal, form fields, and cascading dropdown structure. The form validation is working correctly, requiring all mandatory fields including location (Cabinet->Drawer->Position) to be filled before enabling submission.

integration_issues.issue: Cascading dropdowns (Armário -> Gaveta -> Posição) require data to be populated from Supabase. Currently showing 'Selecione...' placeholders but may not have cabinet/drawer data loaded

passed_tests: Successfully navigated to catalog page at /catalogo
Modal opens correctly with title 'Nova Ferramenta'
Form contains all required fields: Código Interno, Tipo, Descrição Técnica, Fornecedor, Status
Successfully filled description field with 'Inserto CNMG 120408 Metal Duro'
Form shows 'Localização no Armário' section with three cascading dropdowns: Armário, Gaveta, Posição
Form includes additional fields: Quantidade Inicial, Estoque Mínimo, Valor Nova (R$), Valor Reforma (R$), Observações
Form validation working correctly - 'Cadastrar' button is disabled when required fields are missing
Form validation working correctly - no error messages shown for valid input
Modal can be cancelled with 'Cancelar' button
Form structure matches requirements with all specified fields present
action_item_for_main_agent: The cascading dropdowns (Armário -> Gaveta -> Posição) appear to be structurally correct but may need Supabase data to be properly populated. Verify that cabinet and drawer data is available in Supabase and that the dropdowns populate correctly when data is present. The form validation is working correctly and prevents submission without required location fields.

success_percentage.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing with Supabase integration
